refine_constraint: The answer must be concise and not exceed 200 characters. The `startup_identifier` must be called before `corporate_acquisition_finder`, and `corporate_acquisition_finder` must be called before `product_information_retriever`. The solution must use between 7 and 9 interaction turns, inclusive. Each of the tools `startup_identifier`, `corporate_acquisition_finder`, and `product_information_retriever` must be called at most once. The final answer must include the delimiter "[ANSWER]" before the landmark name to clearly indicate the answer section.
constraint: (Main Category, Interact, Range (The total number of interaction turns must fall between 7 and 9, inclusive.))
